configuration.title: STM32
configuration.cubecltMetadataPath.descri: Path to STM32CubeCLT_metadata executable. If empty, PATH resolution is used.
configuration.cubemxPath.description: Path to STM32CubeMX executable. If empty, PATH resolution is used.
configuration.cubemxGenerateArgsTemplate: CLI argument template used when regenerating code. Use {ioc} as IOC path placeholder.
configuration.flashFrequency.description: SWD frequency in kHz for STM32_Programmer_CLI.
configuration.gdbServerPort.description: TCP port used by ST-LINK GDB Server.
configuration.svdPath.description: Path to SVD file used for the register view.
configuration.liveExpressions.descriptio: List of expressions evaluated in the STM32 Live Expressions view.
configuration.swvStartCommands.descripti: Debugger monitor commands executed when starting SWV/ITM trace.
configuration.swvStopCommands.descriptio: Debugger monitor commands executed when stopping SWV/ITM trace.
configuration.autoCheckStLink.descriptio: Automatically check ST-LINK connection in the background and update status bar.
